headline: Is Mastercard (MA) Now Priced Attractive After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Wondering if Mastercard at around US$493 per share is giving you fair value today or asking too much for future growth? This breakdown will help you frame that question clearly. The stock has moved 1.9% over the last 7 days, while showing a 6.0% decline over 30 days and a 12.4% decline year to date, set against a 1.3% return over 1 year, 38.7% over 3 years and 33.4% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on Mastercard as a core player in global payments and on how investors weigh its long...
